notable_phrases: two years worth of digital transformation in two months
Teams now has more than 75 million daily active users
we don't go in there with the mindset of what does it mean for our revenue
summary: Microsoft reported strong cloud and Teams growth driven by accelerated digital transformation during COVID-19, with management expressing high confidence in long-term structural changes despite near-term supply chain constraints and a customer-first monetization approach.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2020 Q2; scores broadly stable QoQ.
